description.ko: 기하학적 도형의 엄격한 정밀함과 디지털 왜곡의 혼란스러운 미학을 결합하여 KURO-X의 미래지향적인 정체성을 구현한 최첨단 비주얼 컨셉입니다.
description.en: A cutting-edge visual concept that blends the rigid precision of geometric shapes with the chaotic beauty of digital distortion, embodying the futuristic identity of KURO-X.

prompt: A high-tech digital art piece titled KURO-X featuring sharp geometric polygons and fragmented square patterns. The aesthetic is defined by heavy glitch effects, chromatic aberration in cyan and magenta, and pixel sorting. A central sleek black futuristic emblem is surrounded by exploding triangular shards and digital noise. Deep obsidian background, high contrast, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed cyberpunk aesthetic.
